TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai == ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 5, Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai, biru na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Afghanistan ta' misuw hya' ga Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Rula Ghani ga, kneril ni Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai. Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai maki tay kawas 1975 msqun ki Rula Ghani, tehuk misuw qani. Rula Saade Ghani htagan beh sa ngasal na Lebanese Christian. kawas tay 1970 maki Lebanon,hga sazing hi mqwas hopa pqwasan biru mqbaq lga msqun mqyanux la.msqun mqyanux beh Amelika hga sazing hi. Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai ru Rula Ghani maki sazing laqi.qutux kneril laqi qutux mlikuy laqi,Mariam ru Tariq lalu nya. Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai htagan beh sa Afghanistan. hiya ga Ahmadzai Pashtun qalang nya. Ashraf tmasot kawas tay 1967,mqwas biru beh Lake Oswego High School in Lake Oswego, Oregon. kawas tay 1973,tmasot mqwas biru beh Amelika hopa pqwasan biru.suruw lga,kawas tay 1977 tmasot mqwas biru beh Columbia hopa pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai, βiru na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw a*ɣħanis~ɕtan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja rula ɣħani ɣa, kneril ni as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai. as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki rula ɣħani, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. rula s~ɕaa*e ɣħani ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ŋas~ɕal na leβanes~ɕe ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtian. kawas~ɕ taj **** maki leβanon,ħɣa s~ɕaziŋ ħi mqwas~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru mqβaq lɣa ms~ɕqun mqjanux la.ms~ɕqun mqjanux βeħ amelika ħɣa s~ɕaziŋ ħi. as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai ru rula ɣħani maki s~ɕaziŋ laqi.qutux kneril laqi qutux mlikuj laqi,mariam ru tariq lalu nja. as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa a*ɣħanis~ɕtan. ħija ɣa aħma*zai pas~ɕħtun qalaŋ nja. as~ɕħra* tmas~ɕot kawas~ɕ taj ****,mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ lake os~ɕweɣo ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool in lake os~ɕweɣo, oreɣon. kawas~ɕ taj ****,tmas~ɕot mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ amelika ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru.s~ɕuruw lɣa,kawas~ɕ taj **** tmas~ɕot mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ ʦ~ʨolumβia ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: == Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai == ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 5, Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai, biru na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Afghanistan ta' misuw hya' ga Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Rula Ghani ga, kneril ni Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai. Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai maki tay kawas 1975 msqun ki Rula Ghani, tehuk misuw qani. Rula Saade Ghani htagan beh sa ngasal na Lebanese Christian. kawas tay 1970 maki Lebanon,hga sazing hi mqwas hopa pqwasan biru mqbaq lga msqun mqyanux la.msqun mqyanux beh Amelika hga sazing hi. Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai ru Rula Ghani maki sazing laqi.qutux kneril laqi qutux mlikuy laqi,Mariam ru Tariq lalu nya. Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai htagan beh sa Afghanistan. hiya ga Ahmadzai Pashtun qalang nya. Ashraf tmasot kawas tay 1967,mqwas biru beh Lake Oswego High School in Lake Oswego, Oregon. kawas tay 1973,tmasot mqwas biru beh Amelika hopa pqwasan biru.suruw lga,kawas tay 1977 tmasot mqwas biru beh Columbia hopa pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai, βiru na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw a*ɣħanis~ɕtan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja rula ɣħani ɣa, kneril ni as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai. as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki rula ɣħani, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. rula s~ɕaa*e ɣħani ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ŋas~ɕal na leβanes~ɕe ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtian. kawas~ɕ taj **** maki leβanon,ħɣa s~ɕaziŋ ħi mqwas~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru mqβaq lɣa ms~ɕqun mqjanux la.ms~ɕqun mqjanux βeħ amelika ħɣa s~ɕaziŋ ħi. as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai ru rula ɣħani maki s~ɕaziŋ laqi.qutux kneril laqi qutux mlikuj laqi,mariam ru tariq lalu nja. as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa a*ɣħanis~ɕtan. ħija ɣa aħma*zai pas~ɕħtun qalaŋ nja. as~ɕħra* tmas~ɕot kawas~ɕ taj ****,mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ lake os~ɕweɣo ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool in lake os~ɕweɣo, oreɣon. kawas~ɕ taj ****,tmas~ɕot mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ amelika ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru.s~ɕuruw lɣa,kawas~ɕ taj **** tmas~ɕot mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ ʦ~ʨolumβia ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
